name: Herline handbag
description:
Hermes Herline Tote MM 

Minor signs of usage like rubs on four corner edges. No holes or tears. 

Width: 42 cm (~16.5 inches).
Height: 31–32 cm (~12.2–12.6 inches).
Depth: 10–11 cm (~3.9–4.3 inches).
Handle Drop: 10–11.5 cm (~3.9–4.5 inches), typically designed for hand or arm carry.
Weight: Approximately 750g (1.65 lb).

The Hermès Herline MM Tote Bag is crafted from a heavy-duty, weather-resistant nylon canvas. 

Exterior Features: The bag features six open slip pockets (three on the front and three on the back) for quick-access items. The sides are equipped with snap buttons that allow for slight expansion or a more tapered look.

Interior Features: The main compartment is secured by a top zipper and a central snap button. Inside, there is one large open patch pocket for organization.

Hardware: It typically uses silver-tone (palladium) hardware, including a branded zipper pull and snap buttons.

Design Details: The handles and vertical trim feature a woven "H" monogram pattern, which is a subtle signature of the line.
